name: socialfetch-marketplace
description: Patrick Debois' marketplace for socialfetch — fetch + search the social web from Claude Code.

plugins.name: socialfetch
plugins.description: Fetch URLs / search / ask / timeline across HN, Reddit, GitHub, X, LinkedIn, YouTube, Bluesky, arXiv, Medium, Substack, RSS, generic articles. Requires the `socialfetch` binary on PATH (see plugin README).
